lastInstruction: Open https://webdriveruniversity.com/Contact-Us/contactus.html. Fill the "First Name" field with "Lightktah", the "Last Name" field with "Pandaktah", the "Email Address" field with "lightktah.pandaktah@example.com", and the "Comments" field with "route isolated lightpanda fill mpliktah". Do not submit and do not take a screenshot. Report the filled values from the page.

lastPlan.userIntent: Navigate to a specific URL and fill out a contact form with provided details.

steps.notes: Direct navigation to the specified contact page.

steps.text: Observe the page to identify the input fields for First Name, Last Name, Email Address, and Comments.
steps.notes: To locate the specific input fields required for the form.

steps.text: Fill the "First Name" field with "Lightktah"; Fill the "Last Name" field with "Pandaktah"; Fill the "Email Address" field with "lightktah.pandaktah@example.com"; Fill the "Comments" field with "route isolated lightpanda fill mpliktah"
steps.notes: Enter the specified first name into the corresponding input field. Enter the specified last name into the corresponding input field. Enter the specified email address into the corresponding input field. Enter the specified comment text into the corresponding input field.

steps.text: Report the filled values from the page.
steps.notes: Document the entered values as requested.

lastPlan.reason: The user has provided a specific URL and form data to fill. The plan involves navigating to the page, locating inputs, and filling them sequentially before reporting the results.

lastCommand.notes: Document the entered values as requested.
